body.text:
{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032314031846AB11E05B36F2E8702D"}"},"total":4768},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7397090748367766297","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写得很好，总的来说瑕不掩瑜，是一个很完整的故事，虽然很长，但是剧情不累赘不拖沓，也没有烂尾。在有限的篇幅里塑造了一个较完整的世界观，属于偏群像文吧，笔墨主要集中在主角和主角团，但是各式各样的配角也同样丰富多彩、有血有肉，每个人都是生动的，使整个故事更加真实立体。剧情很吸引人，虽然个人觉得前期节奏偏慢，后期节奏偏快，但也只是一点点而已，总体看下来还是很舒服的。人物塑造得很好，一口气看下来，有种陪着主角团慢慢成长的感觉（奇怪的欣慰感）。算是传统的中式大团圆结局了（爱看），虽然也死人，不过主角团全员存活，毕竟末世背景，有人牺牲才正常。也许是因为无cp，没有大篇幅腻腻歪歪的爱情描写（有少部分配角的，但写得不错），所以其他友情亲情向写得很好，尤其是主角团之间（可以自己磕，亲测好嗑）。看完有点怅然若失的感觉，书已经完结了，但他们的故事还在继续。他们在书里相互扶持，我在书外陪着。谢谢作者为我带来这个故事，我很喜欢，今后也会时常想起。祝作者和看到评论的大家平安喜乐，万事如意。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1722271662,"group_id":"7262356947725192250","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NycudcU9uEMJFoK880Fcql4=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/c67f6190fbb8441b870d680054a1cfcf~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776790758&x-signature=VPOFTS4m4DDSPta97BP9ysruCaE%3D","user_id":"106629319827","user_name":"寒已暮"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"106629319827","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7262356947725192250","book_info":{"abstract":"（末世＋穿越＋不圣母＋无CP＋升级流＋苟＋异能＋后期更精彩）
庄默穿越平行世界，觉醒末世最安全的木系异能，未来职业是苟在安全区种地。
别人种的土豆口感绵密，他种的土豆大如足球，很硬。
别人种的白菜水灵鲜甜，他种的白菜高一米五，很硬。
……
学院老师：菜种得挺好，就是不能吃。
……
庄默有个秘密，他是个半吊子木系异能，只能控制植物纤维，特长是折纸。
电锯、呼吸面甲、立体机动装甲、载人飞行器、“小男孩”炸弹……全是纸折的。
为了有纸折，还得苦哈哈自己找材料制纸，麻醉纸、剧毒纸、防火纸、储能纸……
变异槐树：求求你给我留两片叶子吧，秃了的王会没威严。
九级异种王：爸爸，我给你磕一个，晶核能不能别掏走？
学院院长：别杀了，异种都快杀没了，不然还是回来种地吧！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b44881cfd1ba7c2d81d1ede87e7fc77d","author":"宿十五","author_id":"","book_id":"7262356947725192250","book_name":"唯一折纸天赋，我能折出一切","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#101818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":830,"name":"升级流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=830&name=升级流&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7262358619944354341","read_count":"35572","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1267139"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"609","tags":"科幻末世,穿越,末世,无女主,升级流,无后宫","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/94bce3c42abfe24879fcf439b3ea218a~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779429798&x-signature=sdTHrEx37DEeWhzdhXEcVo697o4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"68265154404","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1027"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032314031846AB11E05B36F2E8702D"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读50小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":30,"forwarded_count":0,
